channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Supreme Court taking the bench with ghost guns, a capital case and transgender rights on the docket
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is taking the bench again on Monday, ready to hear cases on ghost guns, a death sentence and transgender rights.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US court to review civil rights lawsuit alleging environmental racism in a Louisiana parish
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — A federal appellate court is set to hear oral arguments Monday in a civil rights lawsuit alleging a south Louisiana parish engaged in racist land-use policies to place polluting industries in majority-Black communities.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Florida prepares for massive evacuations as Hurricane Milton takes aim at major metro areas
item.description: Florida is gearing up for what could be a massive evacuation not seen since 2017 as Hurricane Milton strengthens over warm waters.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Martin And Freida Frisaro, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Turning Point wants to revolutionize how Republicans turn out voters. Some are skeptical
item.description: The conservative group Turning Point has long been known for hosting glitzy events, cultivating far-right influencers and raising prodigious amounts of money.
item.dc:creator: Dan Merica And Brian Slodysko, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US spends a record $17.9 billion on military aid to Israel since last Oct. 7
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The United States has spent a record of at least $17.9 billion on military aid to Israel since the war in Gaza began and led to escalating conflict around the Middle East, according to a report for Brown University's Costs of War project, released on the anniversary of Hamas’ attac
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US spends a record $17.9 billion on military aid to Israel since last Oct. 7
item.description: The United States has spent a record of at least $17.9 billion on military aid to Israel since the war in Gaza began and led to escalating conflict around the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Knickmeyer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: For US adversaries, Election Day won't mean the end to efforts to influence Americans
item.description: The hours and days immediately after Election Day are likely to pose the greatest opportunity for anyone looking to mislead and deceive U.S. voters.
item.dc:creator: David Klepper, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tilda Swinton explores assisted suicide in Pedro Almodovar’s 'The Room Next Door'
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Although “The Room Next Door” is Pedro Almodóvar’s first English-language feature, Tilda Swinton notes that he’s never written in a language that anyone else truly speaks.
item.dc:creator: JOHN CARUCCI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: An explosion outside the Karachi, Pakistan, airport kills 2 workers from China and injures others
item.description: KARACHI, Pakistan (AP) — A massive blast outside the Karachi airport in southern Pakistan killed two workers from China on Sunday and injured at least eight others in the latest deadly attack on Chinese in the country.
item.dc:creator: ADIL JAWAD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: More Americans than ever rely on government help: Report
item.description: 53% of Americans draw at least a quarter of their income from government aid like Social Security and Medicare.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Israel intensifies bombardment of Gaza and southern Lebanon ahead of Oct. 7 anniversary
item.description: A new round of airstrikes hit Beirut suburbs late Sunday as Israel intensified its bombardment of northern Gaza and southern Lebanon in a widening war with Iran-allied militant groups across the region. Palestinian officials said a strike on a mosque killed at least 19 people.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton is growing stronger as it blows toward Florida's Tampa Bay region
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Hurricane Milton quickly intensified Sunday and is on track to become a major hurricane with the Tampa Bay area in its sights, putting Florida on edge and triggering evacuation orders along a coast still reeling from Helene’s devastation.
item.dc:creator: FREIDA FRISARO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Historical redlining, current-day diabetes rates linked: NIH study
item.description: “Redlining has significant direct and indirect relationships with diabetes prevalence,” the study authors wrote.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Groups suspend use of 'suicide capsule' pending criminal probe of US woman's death
item.description: Swiss police arrested several people following the death of an unidentified 64-year-old woman from the U.S. Midwest who on Sept. 23 became the first person to use the device.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tennessee nurse and his dog died trying to save a man from floods driven by Helene
item.description: “I’ve never had anyone risk their life for me,” David Boutin, the man Boone McCrary had set out to rescue said. “From what I hear that was the way he always been. He’s my guardian angel, that’s for sure.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Walmart will be closed on Thanksgiving Day for 5th consecutive year
item.description: Walmart will be closed on Thanksgiving Day for the fifth year in a row, the retail giant recently announced in its holiday plans.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Can you stop calls and texts from political campaigns?
item.description: If you've received a political text or call recently, you may be wondering how to make it stop, or what you can do to prevent them in the future.
item.dc:creator: Samantha Jarpe, Fox 5

item.title: Here's what Spirit Halloween seeks in an 'ideal' retail location
item.description: Spirit Halloween made headlines earlier this week after firing back at "SNL" over a sketch that mocked the company's choice of retail locations.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris, Walz to do several high-profile interviews this week
item.description: Harris' media stops this week will include 60 minutes, Howard Stern The View, the Call Her Daddy podcast and Univision.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane Milton growing stronger as it approaches Florida: NHC
item.description: Milton has strengthed into a hurricane in the Gulf of Mexico, according to the National Hurricane Center.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Couple reunited after volunteer rescue pilot threatened with arrest in North Carolina
item.description: Jordan Seidhom, who decided to go help those impacted by Helene with his own helicopter on his own dime, was able to rescue Susan Coffey off a mountainside. But, before he could go back for her husband, Mike, and his own son and co-pilot, he was threatened with arrest.
item.dc:creator: Jody Barr, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Teens arrested in NYC for attack on former NY Gov. David Paterson, his stepson
item.description: Two teens have been arrested and charged with gang assault for the attack on former New York Gov. David Paterson and his 20-year-old stepson, authorities say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: For small cities across Alabama with Haitian populations, Springfield is a cautionary tale
item.description: ENTERPRISE, Ala. (AP) — The transition from the bustling Port-au-Prince, Haiti, to a small Alabama city on the southernmost tip of the Appalachian mountain range was challenging for Sarah Jacques. But over the course of a year, the 22-year-old got used to the quiet and settled in.
item.dc:creator: SAFIYAH RIDDLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Eric Adams channels Trump as he ramps up revenge accusations against the Biden admin, expert says
item.description: Two New Yorkers on opposite sides of the political spectrum have a similar beef with the federal government — allegations of politically motivated prosecution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thousands join pro-Palestinian rallies around the globe as Oct. 7 anniversary nears
item.description: ROME (AP) — Police used tear gas and water cannons to disperse violent demonstrators in Rome as tens of thousands of pro-Palestinian protesters took to the streets in major European cities and around the globe Saturday to call for a cease-fire as the first anniversary of the Hamas attacks on Israel
item.dc:creator: GIADA ZAMPANO and SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Photos: A visual look at Trump's return to Pennsylvania for a rally at site of assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Thousands of supporters returned to Butler, Pennsylvania, on Saturday to rally around Donald Trump at the same site where a gunman tried to assassinate him in July. Many had lined up as the sun rose for the event billed as a “tribute to the American spirit.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Israel expands its bombardment in Lebanon as thousands flee widening war
item.description: MASNAA BORDER CROSSING, Lebanon (AP) — Powerful new explosions rocked Beirut's southern suburbs late Saturday as Israel expanded its bombardment in Lebanon, also striking a Palestinian refugee camp deep in the north for the first time as it targeted both Hezbollah and Hamas fighters.
item.dc:creator: BASSAM HATOUM, MELANIE LIDMAN and BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Elon Musk makes appearance at Trump rally casting election in dire terms
item.description: (AP) - Billionaire tech executive Elon Musk cast the upcoming presidential election in dire terms during a Saturday appearance with Donald Trump, calling the Republican presidential nominee the only candidate “to preserve democracy in America.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Former New York governor and stepson assaulted during evening walk
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Former New York Gov. David Paterson and his stepson sustained minor injuries when they were assaulted on a Manhattan street by four men and a woman as they went for an evening walk, police said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Keanu Reeves spins out at Indianapolis Motor Speedway in pro auto racing debut
item.description: Hollywood star Keanu Reeves made his professional auto racing debut on Saturday in an event in which “The Matrix” star spun out at famed Indianapolis Motor Speedway.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump's return to Butler, Pennsylvania, site of first assassination attempt, is 'gutsy,' supporters say
item.description: Supporters praised former President Trump for returning to Butler, Pennsylvania following the July assassination attempt, saying that it was "courageous" and "gutsy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Many loathe public speakerphone calls, so why do people do it?
item.description: Few things are as universally reviled as a loud phone conversation infringing on your personal space. (Mosquitoes and taxes, aside.) Doing it on loudspeaker is even more incendiary.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KRON4

item.title: These cities have the worst drivers in the U.S., study says
item.description: A Tennessee city has once again been given the dubious title of home to the worst drivers in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: North Carolina is distributing Benadryl and EpiPens as yellow jackets swarm from Helene flooding
item.description: Deadly flooding from Hurricane Helene in western North Carolina has also disrupted the underground nests of yellow jackets, bees and other insects, causing them to swarm and sting people struggling to recover from the storm.
item.dc:creator: DEVI SHASTRI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nigerian track star Oba Femi shines as NXT superstar
item.description: Femi will defend his title Tuesday night on the CW Network. It's a show that also features WWE legend Randy Orton.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, KRON4
